home_description: AI-native MDX docs workspace. Choose a .mdx/.md file or folder to render.
dialog_delete_message:
Delete this MDX/Markdown file? This cannot be undone. If this is a folder, only .md/.mdx files inside it will be deleted. Other files stay untouched.
{filePath}
error_no_mdx_found:
Can’t open this. It may have been moved or deleted, or this folder has no .md/.mdx docs.
{filePath}
error_path_outside_workspace: Path is outside the current workspace: {filePath}
error_path_already_exists: A file or folder already exists: {filePath}
error_mdx_compile_location: Detected likely syntax issue at line {line}, column {column}: {snippet}
error_mdx_compile_html_comment_hint: MDX does not support HTML comments. Use MDX JSX comment syntax instead. If this is sample code, wrap it in a fenced code block.
error_mdx_compile_html_declaration_hint: MDX does not support HTML declarations like <!DOCTYPE>. If this is sample code, wrap it in a fenced code block.
error_updates_packaged_only: Auto updates are only available in packaged builds.
extensions_safe_mode_description: Workspace extension packages are detected but disabled. Enable them only if you trust this workspace.
extensions_trusted_mode_description: Local workspace extension code is running in the document preview renderer.
settings_appearance_description: Switch the built-in Fumadocs UI theme and light or dark mode. Settings are saved locally.
settings_language_description: Switch the MDXForge application language. MDX document content is not translated.
settings_updates_description: Install new MDXForge releases from GitHub Releases.
settings_updates_idle: Updates are ready. Check GitHub Releases when you want.
settings_updates_latest: You are on the latest version.
search_workspace_description: Search all MDX and Markdown files in the open folder.
search_quick_open_description: Open a document by file name, path, or title.
workbench_ai_placeholder_description: Chat support will use the active document and workspace as context.
workbench_terminal_placeholder: Terminal panel placeholder. Local command execution will be added later.
workbench_output_placeholder: Output and task logs will appear here.
theme_neutral_description: Default grayscale, closest to the base Fumadocs look.
theme_black_description: High-contrast black and white with a purer dark mode.
theme_vitepress_description: A white base with blue-purple accents, close to VitePress docs.
theme_dusk_description: Muted purple-gray surfaces with a rose accent.
theme_catppuccin_description: Soft cream tones with a purple accent.
theme_ocean_description: Pale blue-gray cards with a deep ocean primary color.
theme_purple_description: A bright violet theme with a more lively feel.
theme_solar_description: A reading layout that feels closer to standalone paper cards.
theme_emerald_description: A crisp green palette for knowledge bases and notes.
theme_ruby_description: A ruby-red accent that stands out without feeling harsh.
theme_aspen_description: A natural yellow-green palette that stays soft and readable.
preview_unsupported_document_description: MDXForge recognizes {kind} files, but preview support for this format is not implemented yet.
preview_unsupported_document_hint: You can keep it visible in the file tree now; rendering will be added in a later step.
settings_description: Tune language, theme, fonts, and local update preferences.
settings_documents_description: Choose which file extensions appear in the workspace file tree and are treated as renderable documents.
settings_documents_extensions_descriptio: Files matching these suffixes will appear in the sidebar. Keep only formats MDXForge can render safely.
settings_font_description: Choose the reading and interface font. Bricolage matches the reference site; System keeps the platform default.
font_system_description: Clean platform-native font stack. Best for Chinese/English fallback.
font_bricolage_description: The reference site font: rounded, lively, good for UI and numbers.
font_serif_description: More book-like, better for long-form document reading.
font_mono_description: Fixed-width style for specs, code-heavy docs, and technical notes.
settings_skills_description: One-click integration with Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI agents.
skills_open_workspace_empty: Global integration does not require opening a workspace. MDXForge writes to each agent's user-level config/Skills directory.
skills_global_install_root: Global install: writes to each agent's user-level config/Skills directory and links back to this MDXForge app.
skills_empty: No skills configured for this workspace yet.
skills_ai_rules_description: Merged rules from active skills. Copy them into your AI assistant before asking it to write MDXForge docs.
skills_create_local_description: Generate a workspace-local skill with package metadata, rules, and a demo document.
skills_agents_description: One-click install into local AI agents. Claude Code uses a native plugin; Codex/Gemini/OpenCode use skills directories.
skills_agent_not_detected: Not detected on PATH; MDXForge can still write the integration files.
skills_integration_plugin_hint: Installs globally as a native agent plugin, linked to this MDXForge repo. No copies.
skills_integration_skill_hint: Installs globally as an agent skill directory link to this MDXForge repo. No copies.
skills_strategy_claude_code: Native first: Claude Code Plugin (.claude-plugin + marketplace/install). Fallback: global Skill link. This button runs native Plugin + global link, no copies.
skills_strategy_codex: Native first: .codex-plugin/plugin.json. Fallback: ~/.agents/skills/mdxforge-mdx global Skill link. This button runs fallback global link, no copies.
skills_strategy_cursor: Native first: auto-discover .cursor-plugin/plugin.json when this repo is opened. Fallback: ~/.cursor/skills/mdxforge-mdx global Skill link. This button runs fallback global link, no copies.
skills_strategy_vscode_copilot: Native first: .copilot-plugin/plugin.json / VS Code Copilot discovery. Fallback: ~/.copilot/skills/mdxforge-mdx global Skill link. This button runs fallback global link, no copies.
skills_strategy_generic: Native first: the agent's own plugin/skill discovery. Fallback: link into that agent's global Skills directory, no copies.
skills_install_done: Installed. Restart the target agent to apply.
skills_uninstall_done: Uninstalled. Restart the target agent to apply.
